name: Baby Pacifier Express
description: Welcome to our ABDL Express. Our ABDL nanny train attendants will be happy to sit with you during your journey on our train. They will change your diaper and offer you a bottle or breastfeeding and maybe put a vibrator Magic Wand on your diaper during the change. And when you arrive at the station of our train, a new ABDL-mum will be waiting for you.
creator: Alieksandr
